STATE ACTIVE
System menunggu
konfirmasi lokasi
dari user

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
STATE RESET
Location confirmed
System ready for
contextual follow-up

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CONTEXT DETECTED
User references
previous location
